findings.problem: After the homesickness exchange has already landed the chapter's core difference between Kai and Lena, the back half keeps returning to the same identity wound in tidier mirrored forms: Kai's mother calling him 'fixed,' Lena's parents calling her 'complete,' then another matched parent-reading-the-child beat. The outdoor hand/port section finally raises a concrete next step, but the scene retreats into 'I'll try it tomorrow' instead of forcing the connection into an on-page test, cost, or changed behavior. In a designated quiet chapter, that reads as structural recurrence plus timidity: the chapter keeps naming the bond instead of proving it under fresh pressure.
findings.rewrite_direction: Keep the homesickness material anchored at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_07.md:91, but rework the later mirrored beats beginning at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_07.md:105 and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_07.md:173 so at least one of them does new dramatic work rather than restating recognition anxiety. Then revise the hand/port exchange beginning at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_07.md:197 and the deferral at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_07.md:213 so the closing creates an on-page consequence: a partial test, a disclosure with relational cost, or a bodily interaction that changes the goodbye.
findings.acceptance_test: Pass if the revised material after snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_07.md:105 delivers at least one new observable turn that is absent from the homesickness exchange at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_07.md:91, and if the closing exchange after snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_07.md:197 produces an immediate consequence visible on the page before the goodbye at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_07.md:231. Fail if the later scenes still mainly restate parent-recognition anxiety and end with a plan to act later at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_07.md:213.

findings.problem: The chapter's dominant serious-talk register is composed rather than overheard. It repeatedly slips into thesis-speech and mini-speech diagnosis ('all the choices had already happened,' 'Homesickness feels bigger than that,' 'she's looking for the version of me she still recognizes'), with aphoristic compression doing the emotional labor that gesture or rougher speech should be carrying. I checked the sub-modes explicitly: thesis-speech, aphoristic/quotable lines, and mini-speech diagnosis are all present; mic-drop rhetorical questions and narrator admiration are not, but the scene still sounds workshopped more often than lived.
findings.rewrite_direction: Roughen the exchanges beginning at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_07.md:71, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_07.md:97, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_07.md:109, and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_07.md:173 without collapsing the voice split. Kai should keep arriving through concrete analogy, deflation, or additive correction rather than landing clean diagnoses; Lena should keep her precision, but more often narrow the question, restart, or omit instead of delivering complete thematic summaries in one turn.
findings.acceptance_test: Pass if the revised exchanges beginning at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_07.md:71, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_07.md:109, and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_07.md:173 each contain at least one audible piece of character-true roughness on the page: a false start, explicit self-correction, additive correction, narrowed answer, or incomplete social landing. Fail if those spans still read as back-to-back polished diagnoses of choice, identity, homesickness, or parental recognition.

findings.problem: Kai's exchange about his mother sending old race clips and using them to search for the recognizable earlier version of him is too close to the style bible's calibration-only Kai example about his mother watching old footage and claiming she can tell the difference. It is not verbatim, but it is close enough in premise and emotional function to read as an echo of protected calibration material rather than fresh character writing.
findings.rewrite_direction: Replace the beat beginning at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_07.md:105 and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_07.md:109 with a different concrete maternal cue that expresses the same fear without relying on old footage, race clips, or a before-and-after media comparison. Build the moment from this chapter's recovery situation, family habits, or another object specific to Kai's life.
findings.acceptance_test: Pass if the revised lines replacing snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_07.md:105 and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_07.md:109 no longer involve Kai's mother using pre-rebuild footage, clips, or similar recorded evidence to locate the 'real' Kai. Fail if the replacement still hinges on old performance media as the proof of authenticity.

findings.problem: The Alpine walk already has strong concrete atmosphere, but the narration keeps translating the imagery into its own thematic gloss: the mountains were here before the buildings, the facility is small and has no claim on the mountain, the quiet belongs to the mountain. Those sentences explain a contrast the scene has already made legible through snow, distance, lights, cold, and scale, so the prose starts paraphrasing its own meaning instead of trusting image and point of view.
findings.rewrite_direction: Keep the sensory orientation around snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_07.md:131 and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_07.md:147, but replace the explicit thesis sentences at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_07.md:145, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_07.md:146, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_07.md:185, and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_07.md:187 with observations that stay bound to what Lena or Kai physically notices in that moment.
findings.acceptance_test: Pass if the revised outdoor passage still clearly orients the reader to altitude, cold, valley lights, and facility position, while the sentences replacing snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_07.md:145, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_07.md:146, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_07.md:185, and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_07.md:187 do not state the mountain/building contrast in abstract before-or-after or belonging language. Fail if the revision still spells out what the landscape means after the image has already done that work.

summary: FAIL overall. The chapter stays consistent with the canon on tense, setting, and continuity, and the opening hand-override setup is a valid planted seed, but the quiet chapter does not reach pass-level force: it repeats its central identity pressure in mirrored later beats instead of generating a new proof, its dominant serious dialogue register is too composed, one Kai beat echoes calibration-only style-bible material about his mother reading old footage, and the Alpine prose occasionally paraphrases its own thematic contrast instead of letting the image carry it.
